justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial request and subsequent adjustments.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives when the initial request was unavailable and successfully booked the user's chosen alternative.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made no redundant API calls or unnecessary questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a positive customer experience.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and expanded its search intelligently when the initial slot was unavailable, leading to a graceful recovery.
